headline: Analysts See Nearly 3X Upside in Pyxis Oncology (PYXS)
summary: While Pyxis Oncology, Inc. (NASDAQ:PYXS) has gained 54.78% year-to-date, analysts continue to see 293.30% upside, helping it secure a spot on our list of hot biotech stocks under $5 to buy. That analyst conviction is rooted in a busy clinical calendar, with key data readouts from Pyxis Oncology, Inc. (NASDAQ:PYXS)’s lead program expected across the […]

headline: Merck Expands EU Traceability Push And Targets Bundibugyo Ebola Response
summary: Merck (NYSE:MRK) announced a partnership with The Hashgraph Group to build digital product traceability tools aligned with new EU transparency and compliance rules. The company is also working with global health authorities to explore use of its existing antiviral pill and vaccine technologies against the emerging Bundibugyo strain Ebola outbreak. Both developments highlight changes in Merck’s approach to supply chain authentication and infectious disease response that had not been covered...

headline: How screwworm in Texas cattle herds could re-inflate record beef prices this summer
summary: The arrival of the invasive New World screwworm in Texas could hit consumers this summer with beef prices already an acute source of inflation.
